situation_summary: 11-day silence from all account contacts. Renewal in 43 days. Previous CSM had left and account was unassigned for 3 weeks. Health score at 38.
action_taken: Immediate re-assignment to senior CSM. VP CS cold email to CEO. EBR scheduled within 5 days of re-engagement. Re-onboarding session for power users. Reporting module configured live.
outcome: Renewed at same ARR. CEO personally thanked VP CS for outreach. Account health stabilized at 61.
csm_notes: The VP CS cold email broke the silence. Customers who aren't responding to CSM often respond to senior leadership. Don't wait — escalate the outreach if silence exceeds 10 days near renewal.
